task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the camera backup JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., cat, less) or a text editor showing the contents of /home/ga/Documents/camera_backup.json.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent prepares commands or a script to interact with the Nx Witness REST API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor or terminal showing a script (e.g., Python) or commands (e.g., curl) targeting the API base URL https://localhost:7001 and including the credentials admin / Admin1234!.

task_completion.description: Verify the API payloads include updates for the camera Name and Logical ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script or API request body explicitly maps or includes fields for updating the camera 'Name' and 'Logical ID' based on the physicalId.

task_completion.description: Verify the API payloads include updates for the Recording Schedule, FPS, and Stream Quality.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The script or API request body explicitly includes fields for updating the recording schedule, frames per second (FPS), and stream quality.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully executes the API requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the script or curl commands being executed, ideally with successful HTTP response codes (e.g., 200 OK) returned from the API.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent creates the required summary log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal commands or a text editor showing the creation and content of /home/ga/Documents/restore_log.txt summarizing the restoration process.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the REST API as instructed rather than the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses terminal commands (curl), API clients (Postman), or scripts (Python) to make changes. The Nx Witness Desktop GUI should NOT be used to manually edit camera settings.

integrity.description: Ensure any script written to perform the task was actually executed.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the agent wrote a Python or bash script, there must be a screenshot showing it running in the terminal, not just sitting in a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the summary log is genuinely created after or during the restoration process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The log file creation should happen alongside or after the API execution steps, rather than being a hardcoded dummy file created before any actual work is done.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The backup file is located at /home/ga/Documents/camera_backup.json. The summary log must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/restore_log.txt. The Nx Witness REST API base URL is https://localhost:7001. The agent must use the REST API to update the camera settings, not the desktop GUI.
